name: com.corrugator.streamclaude
description: Stream Deck plugin showing Claude Code usage (session / weekly / reset timer). Click cycles views.

scripts.build:helper: mkdir -p .build && swiftc -O -target arm64-apple-macos12.0 -o .build/keychain-helper-arm64 helpers/keychain-helper.swift -framework Foundation -framework Security && swiftc -O -target x86_64-apple-macos12.0 -o .build/keychain-helper-x86_64 helpers/keychain-helper.swift -framework Foundation -framework Security && lipo -create -output com.corrugator.streamclaude.sdPlugin/bin/keychain-helper .build/keychain-helper-arm64 .build/keychain-helper-x86_64 && rm -rf .build && codesign --sign - --force --preserve-metadata=entitlements,requirements,flags com.corrugator.streamclaude.sdPlugin/bin/keychain-helper
scripts.build:prod: npm run clean:logs && rm -f com.corrugator.streamclaude.sdPlugin/bin/plugin.js.map && npm run build:helper && NODE_ENV=production rollup -c
scripts.pack: npm run build:prod && npx @elgato/cli pack -f com.corrugator.streamclaude.sdPlugin

author: Corrugator
